---
name: Feature request
about: Suggest an idea or enhancement for the portfolio
title: ''
labels: enhancement
assignees: ''

---

Please provide the following information to help us evaluate your feature suggestion.

Important Warning:
Do not include sensitive credentials, API keys, private tokens, or personal identifiers in your proposal.

### Problem Statement

A clear and concise description of what the problem or limitation is.

### Proposed Solution

A clear and concise description of what you want to happen and how it should work.

### Target Audience and Use Case

Explain who benefit from this feature and why it is useful.

### Alternatives Considered

A description of any alternative solutions, designs, or workarounds you have considered.

### Visual and Content Impact

Describe if this introduces new page designs, text content, or asset files.

### Security and Privacy Considerations

Note if this feature handles user input, external integration, or tracking scripts.
